title: Garlicky Ethiopian Garlic Stir-Fry
description: A show-off vegan-friendly dish featuring crispy garlic and red chili powder with a touch of Ethiopian spices for a spicy yet savory flavor.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant and lightly golden, about 2 minutes.
Toss in chopped onions and ginger, cook for another 3-4 minutes until softened.
Add red bell pepper to the pan, stir-fry for an additional minute.
Pour in tomato paste, reduce it slightly by scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Gradually add chili powder, thyme (if using), salt, and black pepper. Stir continuously until well combined and slightly thickened.
Reduce heat to low-medium and let simmer for about 5 minutes so flavors can meld together.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
